repository: {%- if cookiecutter.repository_destination == 'github' -%}BlueBrain/{{ cookiecutter.project_name }}{%- elif cookiecutter.repository_destination == 'gitlab' -%}{{ cookiecutter.team_name }}/{{ cookiecutter.project_name }}{% endif %}
download_url: {%- if cookiecutter.repository_destination == 'github' -%}git@github.com:{{ cookiecutter.repository }}.git{%- elif cookiecutter.repository_destination == 'gitlab' -%}git@bbpgitlab.epfl.ch:{{ cookiecutter.repository }}.git{% endif %}
tracker_url: {%- if cookiecutter.repository_destination == 'github' -%}https://github.com/{{ cookiecutter.repository }}/issues{%- elif cookiecutter.repository_destination == 'gitlab' -%}https://bbpteam.epfl.ch/project/issues/projects/CELLS/issues{% endif %}
project_url: {%- if cookiecutter.repository_destination == 'github' -%}https://{{ cookiecutter.project_name }}.readthedocs.io{%- elif cookiecutter.repository_destination == 'gitlab' -%}https://bbpteam.epfl.ch/documentation/projects/{{ cookiecutter.project_name }}{% endif %}
